materials.name: Milinion TV Cabinet 180 cm
materials.description: Made from treated wood to ensure a safe and durable build. Finished with melamine for excellent heat and moisture resistance. Features 2 smooth-running drawers for organized storage. Includes 2 open cabinets for concealed storage and an open shelf for easy access. Supported by coated steel legs for stability and style. Ideal for use in bedrooms or living spaces.

materials.name: Picasso TV Cabinet 180cm (Ivory)
materials.description: Sleek TV cabinet design. The grooved leg details add a modern touch with gold aluminium trim. Can easily mix and match a room in a variety of styles. The Picasso series is designed to be placed together with sideboard cabinets. Showcase in the same series or mix and match with other furniture models. 18 mm frame with ivory melamine finish cross metal. 18 mm open door with ivory melamine finish cross metal. Interior layer made of 18 mm treated wood with ivory melamine finish. Left leg made of 18 mm MDF corrugation in ivory paint. Right leg made of 18 mm MDF in ivory paint. Decorated with gold aluminum strands. 3 openings with soft close hinges and 1 wooden adjustable layer.

attributes.value: Living Room/Kurt_/TV Stand/Picasso TV Cabinet 180cm (Ivory)/Picasso TV Cabinet 180cm (Ivory).docx

materials.sourceDocument: Living Room/Kurt_/TV Stand/Picasso TV Cabinet 180cm (Ivory)/Picasso TV Cabinet 180cm (Ivory).docx

materials.name: Takayama Solid Wood TV Cabinet 150cm (Light Teak)
materials.description: Made from real rubber wood, woven with natural rattan, beautiful and unique. The wood grain is eye-catching, with stylish storage, ultra-clean lines, and natural elements. Rubber wood is painted with teak wood to look natural and add durability to the furniture as well. Adjustable shelves and soft-close hinges. Black plastic handles and rubber wood legs. Real rattan hand-woven coated with moisture repellent and insect. It is perfectly combined with other furniture in the Takayama series. As it is made of natural wood, resulting in different colors and patterns in each piece. Furniture for indoor use only

attributes.value: Living Room/Kurt_/TV Stand/Takayama Solid Wood TV Cabinet 150cm (Light Teak)/Takayama Solid Wood TV Cabinet 150cm (Light Teak).docx
Living Room/Kurt_/TV Stand/Takayama Solid Wood TV Cabinet 150cm (Light Teak)

materials.productFolder: Living Room/Kurt_/TV Stand/Takayama Solid Wood TV Cabinet 150cm (Light Teak)

materials.name: Wasabi Solid Wood TV Cabinet 200CM (Natural)
materials.description: Enhance your living area with this large TV cabinet. Suitable for any room, this is the ideal solution for neatly arranging all of your media essentials. Made with a combination of real solid rubberwood, protective paper foil and treated wood, this attractive cabinet is built to last. There are 2 doors, left and right, 2 drawers in the middle, able to store a variety of things. and dust-free as well. Solid rubberwood exterior with solid wood adjustable shelving. Solid rubberwood legs with middle leg for better support. Soft close hinges for silent closing. Suitable for TV screens up to 75 inch with a center stand. Clear coating retains a natural look with added durability. Natural wood displays different color and patterns in each piece.
